title: AP Edits Product Details with GenAI - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the GenAI-assisted product editing feature for Assistive Partners (APs) on the PwD Catalog Portal. This feature enables APs to edit and improve existing product details using AI assistance for accessibility-compliant content including Short Description, Long Description, Specifications, ALT Text, and other product fields.

inScope: Edit Product access from Product Management
GenAI button visibility and tooltip functionality
GenAI editing capabilities for text fields
ALT Text generation and editing for images
Side-by-side comparison of original vs AI suggestions
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance of GenAI interface
outOfScope: Admin audit logging verification (requires admin access)

dependencies.relatedStory: SCRUM-20 - GenAI Assistant for Product Upload

prerequisites: Valid AP account with approved status

testCases.title: Verify Edit Product option in Product Management action column
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP with existing products
steps: Locate a product in the list
Verify 'Edit Product' option in action column
expectedResults: Product Management page loads with product list
Product is visible in the list
Edit Product option is visible in action column

testCases.title: Verify Product Edit Form opens with all editable fields
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP, on Product Management page
steps: Click 'Edit Product' for an existing product
Wait for Product Edit Form to load
Verify all editable fields are displayed
expectedResults: Form displays: Product Category, Short Description, Long Description
Form displays: Product's unique feature, Buying Guide, Technical specification
Form displays: Product Media with ALT Text, Youtube links
Form displays: Support and delivery Info, Geographical availability
Form displays: Links and additional info, Product links
testCases.postconditions: All editable fields are visible and accessible

testCases.title: Verify all fields are editable for draft products
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Access to Edit Mode (Comment: For draft all fields will be editable)
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP with a draft product
steps: Click Edit on a product in Draft status
expectedResults: Product Edit Form opens for draft product
Input is accepted in all fields
No fields are disabled or read-only
testCases.postconditions: Draft product fields are fully editable

testCases.title: Verify 'Enhance with GenAI' button visibility on all text fields
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form with existing content
steps: Open Product Edit Form for a product with content
Verify GenAI button on Short Description field
Verify GenAI button on Long Description field
Verify GenAI button on Technical Specification field
Hover over each button to see tooltip
expectedResults: GenAI button visible next to Short Description
GenAI button visible next to Long Description
GenAI button visible next to Technical Specification
Tooltip shows: 'Use GenAI to improve clarity, tone, or accessibility of this content.'
testCases.postconditions: GenAI buttons are ready for interaction on all text fields

testCases.title: Verify GenAI button is inactive when field is empty
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form
expectedResults: GenAI button becomes inactive or disabled
Button does not respond to clicks when field is empty
testCases.postconditions: GenAI requires text to be present

testCases.title: Verify GenAI improves text quality (readability, grammar, tone)
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form with text content
steps: Enter complex/technical text with grammatical errors in Short Description
Review the improved text for readability, grammar, and tone
expectedResults: Complex text with errors is entered
Simplified version is suggested with grammar corrections
Text is more readable, grammatically correct, and well-structured
testCases.postconditions: Improved text is available for review

testCases.title: Verify GenAI adds accessibility language
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form with basic product description
steps: Enter basic product description without accessibility focus

testCases.title: Verify 'Add/Improve ALT Text with GenAI' button for images
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - ALT Text Generation and Editing
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form with uploaded images
steps: Open Product Edit Form with existing product images
Verify 'Add/Improve ALT Text with GenAI' button for each image
expectedResults: Product Media section shows uploaded images
GenAI ALT Text button is visible for each image
testCases.postconditions: ALT Text GenAI button is accessible

testCases.title: Verify GenAI generates proper ALT text (context-based, no decorative phrasing, ~125 chars)
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - ALT Text Generation and Editing
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form with product image
steps: Locate an image without ALT text
Wait for GenAI to analyze and generate ALT text
Review the generated ALT text for quality
Verify no 'image of...' or similar redundant phrases
Verify character count is ~125 or less
expectedResults: GenAI analyzes image name, context, and product info
ALT text is generated with clear, neutral description
No decorative phrasing like 'image of...' or 'picture of...'
Character count is approximately 125 or less
testCases.postconditions: ALT text is generated following best practices

testCases.title: Verify AP can manually edit generated ALT text
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - ALT Text Generation and Editing
testCases.preconditions: User has generated ALT text using GenAI
steps: Generate ALT text for an image
Click to edit the generated ALT text

testCases.title: Verify side-by-side comparison of original vs AI suggestions
testCases.preconditions: User has triggered GenAI for text improvement
steps: Verify side-by-side display of original and suggested text
expectedResults: Clear visual distinction between original and suggested

testCases.title: Verify 'Accept all AI suggestions' functionality
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing AI suggestions side-by-side
steps: Generate AI suggestions for a field
Verify original text is replaced with AI suggestions
expectedResults: AI-suggested text is now in the field

testCases.title: Verify 'Edit or merge parts manually' functionality
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing AI suggestions
testCases.postconditions: Merged content is in the field

testCases.title: Verify 'Reject and retain original content' functionality
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing AI suggestions

testCases.title: Verify generated text includes sensory/physical feature cues
testCases.preconditions: User has generated AI suggestions
steps: Generate AI suggestions for product description

testCases.title: Verify Save Changes creates new version
testCases.preconditions: User has made edits to product details
steps: Make edits to product description using GenAI
Check that previous version is preserved
expectedResults: Previous version is available for rollback

testCases.title: Verify product status changes to Pending Review after save
testCases.preconditions: User has made and saved edits
testCases.postconditions: Product is in Pending Review status

testCases.title: Verify confirmation message after successful save
testCases.preconditions: User has made edits and clicked Save
expectedResults: Message says: 'Your product details have been updated and submitted for review.'
testCases.postconditions: User is informed of successful save

testCases.title: Verify error message when GenAI service is unavailable
testCases.preconditions: GenAI service is unavailable (simulated)
steps: Click GenAI button when service is down
expectedResults: Message says: 'AI assistant is temporarily offline. Please try again later.'
testCases.postconditions: User is informed of service unavailability

testCases.title: Verify GenAI interface supports keyboard navigation
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - Usability and Accessibility of GenAI Interface
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form
steps: Navigate to GenAI button using Tab key
Navigate through GenAI panel using keyboard
expectedResults: All actions can be performed via keyboard
testCases.postconditions: GenAI interface is fully keyboard accessible

testCases.title: Verify GenAI interface works with screen readers
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - Usability and Accessibility of GenAI Interface
testCases.preconditions: Screen reader is enabled
steps: Verify all elements are announced correctly
expectedResults: Original vs AI text is distinguishable

testCases.title: Verify clear contrast and focus states in GenAI interface
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - Usability and Accessibility of GenAI Interface
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing GenAI panel
steps: Check color contrast of text and buttons
expectedResults: Focus indicators are visible on all elements

testCases.title: Verify visual distinction between original and AI-generated text
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - Usability and Accessibility of GenAI Interface
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing side-by-side comparison
steps: Check visual distinction between original and AI text

testCases.title: Verify version rollback functionality
testCases.preconditions: Product has multiple versions saved

testCases.title: Verify GenAI handles multiple consecutive edits
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form
steps: Generate AI suggestions for Short Description
Generate AI suggestions again for same field
Repeat for Long Description and Specifications
expectedResults: First suggestions are generated and accepted
Second generation works on updated text
Multiple fields can be enhanced consecutively

testCases.title: Verify edit without using GenAI (manual edit)
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Edit Form
steps: Edit fields manually without using GenAI
testCases.postconditions: Manual editing works independently of GenAI

testCases.title: Verify cancel edit without saving
testCases.preconditions: User has made edits but not saved

userAccounts: Approved Assistive Partner account with existing products
productData: Products in Draft status (all fields editable)
Products with existing descriptions and specifications
Products with uploaded images (for ALT text testing)
Products with grammatical errors for correction testing
textSamples: Complex technical text for simplification testing

assumptions: GenAI service (Amazon Bedrock) is operational and accessible
AP accounts have been properly set up with approved status
Products exist in Product Management for editing
Network connectivity is stable for API calls
Test environment mirrors production GenAI configuration
risks: GenAI service availability may affect test execution
Generated content quality may vary between test runs
Version control functionality depends on backend implementation
